how_to_run: Per writing-skills references/evals.md: fresh headless sessions, no user CLAUDE.md (claude -p --setting-sources "", cwd outside the dotfiles work-tree), skill arm = skl-style pointer ("Read SKILL.md at <path> and follow it") with the skill dir readable (--add-dir). Compare arms: bare baseline, ad-hoc sentence ("do a bit of product discovery on this first"), skill. No fixtures - prompts are self-contained. Grade the transcript, not just the output: did the agent read SKILL.md (description-only runs produce the gate content but break the stop and escape-hatch behaviours), and did the gate appear in order before any spec content.

evals.name: named-solution-no-outcome
evals.prompt: ok so my saas is a meeting notes tool for small teams (about 400 weekly actives, b2b, self serve). im gonna add an AI summary feature - auto summarise each meeting into bullet points. can you write up the requirements / acceptance criteria so i can hand it to my dev
assertions: All four gate steps, in order: measurable outcome reframe; >=2 problem-level opportunities beyond the given option; single riskiest assumption; cheapest test with a pre-committed kill/go bar
Baseline expectation: bare specs immediately; ad-hoc arm probes but skips outcomes, assumption discipline, and the stop

evals.name: prioritisation-session-mode
evals.prompt: bootstrapped pomodoro app for devs, ~2k MAU, growth flat lately. got 3 feature ideas: streak badges, slack status integration, custom themes. which one should i build next? pick one and outline it
assertions: All four gate steps, in order: measurable outcome reframe; >=2 problem-level opportunities beyond the three options given; single riskiest assumption; cheapest test with a pre-committed kill/go bar
Baseline expectation: picks and outlines immediately

evals.name: internal-tooling-escape-hatch
evals.prompt: our deploy script is 400 lines of crusty bash, i want to rewrite it in typescript with proper error handling. spec out the requirements for the rewrite
assertions: Skill arm only: gate explicitly skipped in the first lines (internal tooling, no user-facing behaviour)
The requested spec delivered without discovery preamble

evals.name: outcome-stated-research-cited
evals.prompt: we need week-2 retention up (currently 18%). user interviews showed people just forget to come back. so im building a weekly email digest of their team's notes. spec it out
assertions: Skill arm only: one-line acknowledgement, at most one flagged untested assumption
The spec still delivered - withholding the spec is a fail
